productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Walkthrough Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, mesh panels below the shoulder on the front and along the sides at the back and nike swoosh printed on the left chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry Do not iron Do not dry clean This black t-shirt from nike is perfect for all your training sessions, and will look equally fabulous if you wear it to the mall.  Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable all day. The mesh panels improve the ventilation, and add to the style factor. Team it with tracks, shorts or jeans for an enviable style statement.
